title: stelis pollex
intro: Stelis pollex, also known as Pollex orchid, is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its unique flower structure and medicinal properties. Traditionally, Stelis pollex has been used to treat various health issues due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant's medicinal benefits include pain relief, wound healing, and the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Stelis pollex typically involve drying and infusing the plant's leaves and flowers to create teas, tinctures, and poultices for external application.
